creator: imp@FreeBSD.org
text:
Originally the intent of this knob was to not *INSTALL* the symbol files, but to still generate them. So you would have them in your build tree, but not blow out the tiny root filesystems of the time in case you needed to debug a kernel core file. I'd support restoring that behavior and/or making it behave that way or something similar. I'm not sure when it changed and am too lazy to do the archeology to see if I screwed up implementing it, or someone changed it along the way.

Therefore, I think cem@'s change is a bug and should be reverted.
